data.title: Deckers Outdoor Corp beat Q2 earnings with $1.82 EPS; revenue hit $1.43 billion, exceeding estimates. They forecast $6.30-$6.39 EPS and $5.35 billion revenue.
data.description: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (NYSE: DECK) exceeded expectations in their second-quarter earnings report. They reported earnings of $1.82 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.57 by 16%. Quarterly revenue was $1.43 billion, above the expected $1.41 billion. Deckers anticipates fiscal GAAP EPS between $6.30 to $6.39, compared to the estimated $6.28 EPS, and revenue of $5.35 billion, rather than the expected $5.45 billion. The company highlighted double-digit growth in the second quarter for their brands HOKA and UGG, driven by strong performance and international expansion. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Maxine Waters criticizes Trump for pardoning Binance founder CZ, calling it corrupt & prioritizing criminals over working families.
data.description: Congresswoman Maxine Waters (D-CA) criticized President Donald Trump for reportedly pardoning Binance founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao, branding it a "blatant display of corruption" linked to his personal financial interests in the digital asset industry. Waters condemned Trump's action as showcasing a presidency tainted by corruption and prioritizing criminals over working families. This statement was issued by the House Financial Services Committee in response to reports of CZ pleading guilty to charges involving money laundering and illegal transactions. Waters made these remarks amidst the ongoing government shutdown, where federal employees remain unpaid, and critical public services endure disruptions. She pointed out that the timing of the pardon sheds light on Trump's genuine agenda, accusing him of favoring crypto criminals over the well-being of ordinary citizens.

data.title: Pro-Trump billionaire criticizes Trump's pardon of Binance founder CZ Zhao, expressing concerns over massive fraud. Zhao paid $50 million fine and served 4 months in jail for company's $4.3 billion penalty.
data.description: Joe Lonsdale, a well-known Trump supporter and co-founder of Palantir, publicly criticized the president's decision to pardon Changpeng "CZ" Zhao, the co-founder of Binance. Lonsdale stated that "POTUS has been terribly advised on this," expressing concern that it gives the impression of widespread fraud in the surrounding area. Despite his admiration for Trump's administration, he believes these pardons are a significant flaw. Zhao, a billionaire and influential figure in cryptocurrency, stepped down from his role as Binance's CEO in 2023 after the company admitted guilt to failing in its anti-money laundering efforts, resulting in a $4.3 billion penalty. Personally, Zhao paid a $50 million fine and spent approximately four months in prison after pleading guilty to the same charge as his company. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sonoran Desert Institute offers single-course access for hobbyists and professionals, specializing in firearms and technology.
data.description: In Tempe, Arizona on October 24, 2025, Sonoran Desert Institute (SDI) announced the launch of single-course enrollment options. This DEAC-accredited online institution focuses on firearms and uncrewed technology education. This new enrollment option is targeted towards experienced hobbyists, working technicians, and lifelong learners who are interested in furthering their knowledge.

data.title: PCOS Challenge and AE-PCOS Society host first PCOS Awareness Symposium in Texas, promoting awareness in San Antonio.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, in San Antonio, the National Polycystic Ovary Syndrome Association revealed the upcoming PCOS Awareness Symposium 2025 in collaboration with the Androgen Excess and PCOS Society. This symposium aims to raise awareness about Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) and is supported by leading researchers in the field.

data.title: Indigo Rose Software releases Setup Factory 10.1 installer builder for Windows, used by thousands of developers since 1991.
data.description: Indigo Rose Software has released Setup Factory 10.1, a reliable installer builder for Windows applications, on Oct. 24, 2025, in Winnipeg, MB. With a proven track record dating back to 1991, Setup Factory is the choice of numerous developers worldwide. This latest version promises enhanced functionality and ease of use for software creators, making it a go-to solution for building installers for their Windows-based applications.

data.title: FangDD issues $34.32M convertible note; to purchase assets and issue Class C shares.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on October 24, 2025, Fangdd Network Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: DUO) revealed it has engaged in a convertible note purchase agreement. Fangdd, a prominent property technology firm in China, disclosed issuing a convertible promissory note valuing US$34,320,000 to an investor via private placement.

data.title: AlarMax promotes Matt Ehrman to Senior VP, Supply Chain in Pittsburgh on Oct. 24, 2025, showing commitment to supply chain growth.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, AlarMax has promoted Matt Ehrman to Senior Vice President of Supply Chain. This move underscores the company's dedication to enhancing its supply chain infrastructure for its dealers, branches, and vendor partners.

data.title: Connectbase wins "Best Data Service Innovation" at Global Connectivity Awards 2025. Hosted by Capacity Media.
data.description: In Boston on October 24, 2025, Connectbase, the Operating System for Connected Commerce, revealed that it secured the title of "Best Data Service Innovation" at the 2025 Global Connectivity Awards, organized by Capacity Media. This accolade highlights Connectbase's innovative approach in the field of data services.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts acquires new site in Cincinnati, marking expansion of Flying Ace Express Car Wash brand.
data.description: In Columbus and Cincinnati on October 24, 2025, Express Wash Concepts (EWC) declared the ongoing growth of its Flying Ace Express Car Wash brand by acquiring a new site. EWC is known as one of the rapidly expanding express car wash operators in the country. The specific location of the new site was not provided in the information.

data.title: XData Group and ComplyControl sponsor AWS Community Day Georgia 2025, uniting cloud professionals, developers, and IT enthusiasts.
data.description: In Tallinn, Estonia on October 24, 2025, XData Group and ComplyControl were honored to sponsor the AWS Community Day Georgia 2025. This significant event united cloud technology experts, developers, and IT enthusiasts for an opportunity to exchange knowledge and foster deeper connections in the industry.

data.title: Fidelity Investments adds Solana (SOL) to its digital assets lineup, enabling U.S. clients to trade and store the cryptocurrency.
data.description: Fidelity Investments has recently expanded its digital asset offerings to include Solana (SOL), providing U.S. brokerage customers access to custody and trading services for this cryptocurrency. This move showcases the company's commitment to catering to the growing demand for digital assets among investors.
